tools.name: make_widget_snippet
tools.description: Return a minimal browser SDK snippet for mounting captcha.cc and submitting the proof token to an application endpoint.

tools.name: make_siteverify_request
tools.description: Return a server-side fetch example for redeeming a captcha.cc proof token exactly once.

tools.name: create_challenge
tools.description: Create a live captcha.cc challenge for a site key and allowed hostname. Useful for smoke tests and integration checks.
